description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push to any branch and tags v*.* and snapshot-*, and on any pull request. The workflow has two jobs: release and build. The release job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python, determines the release type, creates a draft release if not a dev build, and uploads the release URL as an artifact. The build job runs on a matrix of platforms (lin, mac, win), needs the release job to complete, checks out the code, sets up Python, downloads the release URL artifact, determines the release info if not a dev build, installs dependencies, builds the package, and uploads the build artifact to the release or as a separate artifact.
